title: Harden renderer security
description: Run an Electron app through the security checklist: isolation, preload surface, IPC validation, navigation, and CSP.
body: Steps: 1. Confirm every renderer has contextIsolation:true, nodeIntegration:false, sandbox:true. 2. Audit the preload bridge: only named, minimal functions exposed, no raw ipcRenderer/require. 3. Review each ipcMain handler for sender and payload validation and path constraints. 4. Lock down navigation (will-navigate, setWindowOpenHandler) and set a strict CSP. 5. Verify remote content is never loaded into a privileged renderer. Rollback point: before relaxing any setting (document why). Validation: an audit passes all checklist items and a page cannot reach Node or call unintended handlers; any single relaxed setting (nodeIntegration on, broad preload, unvalidated IPC) is a finding to fix before release.
